entries.gt_aa8c4e74574d15: The Pass Bureau is listening. Do not stand on the carpet line without grounds.
entries.gt_e32c9267ea0346: A pass is issued to those who already have the right to a pass. That is how order separates itself from the corridor.
entries.gt_b9013f4695d230: First the application, then the stamp, then the archive card. In the reverse order, people disappear more often.
entries.gt_a20e45afd4dd07: If they told you the window is closed, clarify which window. We do not have any, but formally they function.
entries.gt_be4227d8e39f48: Bring the ballots. I will issue a control key before your number goes into the lower log.
entries.gt_5a7aeae977ac1b: Do not argue with the queue. The queue is older than the minister.
entries.gt_5e53246b376151: If the corridor demands a signature, write in block letters. It reads trembling hands poorly.
entries.gt_ffde706ff6aa3b: I saw a pass without an owner. It passed inspection faster than everyone.
entries.gt_91c9cf8f79b2ff: The path is singular only on the poster. In practice, people wait, pay, forge, pressure, help, or crawl into a cabinet.
entries.gt_5ace142481e35b: The stub is ready. At the first post, hold it stamp side up.
entries.gt_bebfdcc435ff33: Your file is still alive. That is not a right, it is a postponement.
entries.gt_b07fb6fc921cfe: The next window will receive you yesterday.
entries.gt_054116e18ff22f: Tell them that a pass without a stamp is a request for interrogation.
entries.gt_ee785bb0784429: Waiting is the cheapest fee. Stand in the Hall of the Impossible Queue and do not try to hurry the minute.
entries.gt_f109977a9de3f5: The queue issues stubs to those who look like furniture long enough.
entries.gt_b608749e448ad6: If they call you by yesterday's number, answer calmly. Yesterday is served faster here.
entries.gt_f3c19cc0d59ce0: You waited it out. That is almost suspicious.
entries.gt_5e8285e39d44c8: The stub was issued legally: the queue itself grew tired of holding you.
entries.gt_4f44d2311e9e7a: A fast fee is not a bribe. A bribe is embarrassed by a receipt.
entries.gt_9ab2191f883e70: Ninety rubles, and I mark you as if you had stood since morning.
entries.gt_5929ce84e06298: Money does not open the door. It gives you paper the guard is afraid to read aloud.
entries.gt_e3d90a68523114: The fee went through. Do not ask under which article.
entries.gt_982bd48f023e9b: A receipt is quieter than a pass, but sometimes more important.
entries.gt_7b97e3d4402689: I do not forge. I put the signature where it has long been expected.
entries.gt_ebb6adbb3aaf98: Bring a sheet with a fake stamp and there will be a stub. Not official, but fast.
entries.gt_d49d768239b379: A real stamp leaves a burn on sealing wax. Mine only stains the fingers.
entries.gt_fbe434945ce906: The forged stub is ready. Keep it away from honest lamps.
entries.gt_1a8bc9a1b054f4: If audit asks, you and I are unacquainted even by alphabet.
entries.gt_82f9fdc9adbefa: The queue respects paper that sounds like an order.
entries.gt_ae58717bb7087a: Bring an unsigned order. I will lay it on the counter so the window finds a stamp by itself.
entries.gt_f116e8854bf1fa: After that, the stub will be real, and their attitude to you will not.
entries.gt_b06f23093f7a16: The duty clerk was frightened correctly. Now leave before he calls witnesses.
entries.gt_4346ae7aaad7fc: You have the stub. Do not smile: the queue remembers teeth.
entries.gt_b42bba2ba4e06e: Vera Propuskova: Bring three ballots. I will issue a control key for the first post.
entries.gt_bb411f18a15e9c: Vera Propuskova: Tell Zoya Surguchnaya in the stamp room that a stub without her mark will be turned back by the guard at the first post.
entries.gt_846fe60c776852: Nazar Sekundomerov: The legal route is simple: stand in the Hall of the Impossible Queue {dir}. When the roster reaches your surname, you get a stub.
entries.gt_c5792857b5625d: Ministry: Hall of the Impossible Queue, with rows of chairs and Osip's card file.
entries.gt_30a4d029549e00: Pass received by waiting in the Ministry queue.
entries.gt_885466430970c0: Rimma Uskoritelnaya: Ninety rubles for the fast fee. The window will issue a stub, and the receipt will pass N3 as a quiet bribe with an audit tail.
entries.gt_c311877cbd43e5: The Pass Bureau processed a stub through the fast fee.
entries.gt_9c5e8ad1a6ec38: Fedya Kalkovy: Bring the sheet with a fake stamp here. I will make a forged stub: the guard will let you through, and audit will later search for someone else's handwriting.
entries.gt_9bbb8b6bd14dae: A forged pass stub was made in the Pass Bureau.
entries.gt_8cf36cde7a639f: Gleb Prizhimnoy: We need an unsigned order. We will put it on the counter, and the duty clerk will issue the stub before he understands whom to call.
entries.gt_f1976d0f2db127: The pass window issued a stub after pressure from an unsigned order.
entries.gt_15262df273950d: CB is not faith; it is an incoming number. Faith goes in a separate folder here.
entries.gt_0b0090c66d6e68: Submit the cell diagram officially. After that, witnesses become lines, and lines become quieter.
entries.gt_310401a400c60e: The central cell exists on the form. No one in the building has seen it, and that is very convenient.
entries.gt_f1961f71e829bb: The case is accepted. Now it is more frightening, because it lies in the right place.
entries.gt_87f8b7d64a955d: Witnesses will be summoned if they remain witnesses after the correction.
entries.gt_1a466cb0831cd4: I do not lie in documents. I give them a convenient gait.
entries.gt_3c6ef12dba9956: A testimony correction is useful because it has already confessed to being a correction.
entries.gt_9874e102457384: Bring the CB sheet, and the witness will see exactly what the stamp can withstand.
entries.gt_317f2b20510a27: The copy is ready. The original now looks more nervous.
entries.gt_b33aef532b6e57: If they ask who edited it, say the correction was accepted under the lower log.
entries.gt_7c1bc3cf3db50d: I buy frightening paper as ordinary paper. Extra pay for living surnames.
entries.gt_42ce6f7604c214: A seizure act is worth more than an idol: the idol is silent, the act shows who came for it.
entries.gt_77681902543ed8: Sell it, and the addresses will go where the queue does not ask for a stamp.
entries.gt_32994257d7ad8d: The deal is closed. The paper is no longer yours, but the rumor already is.
entries.gt_5eaaee2ac881dd: If the act starts looking for its owner, I did not see you.
entries.gt_4cdb25b29222fb: I am not hiding a cult. I am hiding people whom the cult and the archive divide by lines.
entries.gt_a28d502d3daa86: The external cell index must not be read in a queue. The queue immediately starts looking for extras.
entries.gt_743116a7b571c1: Give it to me, and some surnames will be ordinary surnames at least until the siren.
entries.gt_e1f54d933b1fb8: The index is hidden. Let them search by surname now, and surnames here are written any which way.
entries.gt_056590eefc7a26: If they ask me, I am not a witness. I even have a certificate.
entries.gt_5c8c1c629061ca: Bring the CB memo here. We do not argue whether a reason exists. We verify the address.
entries.gt_40c167b2a588f8: An external cell is when the neighbor is still a neighbor, but the door is already writing a report.
entries.gt_44e95edec55335: Show the memo, and liquidators will follow the lines. That does not always save the lines.
entries.gt_f2e3a77513fddc: The memo is accepted. The addresses received a queue for cleanup.
entries.gt_dbdb9a857d9976: If anyone asks about Chernobog, there is one answer: the order contains no god.
entries.gt_72785504f38ffa: Red strikeouts are sometimes more honest than black ones. In red you can still see who was afraid.
entries.gt_e654dcbb899bd6: The central note proves nothing. Good notes prove nothing at all.
entries.gt_4c9bf4866933c9: Show it to us, and the external ones will stop waiting for an answer from the archive.
entries.gt_bf0a6c754d1896: The note has been heard. Not read - heard.
entries.gt_aef17979a2b272: Now the external ones will have fewer questions and more routes.
entries.gt_c498a895fc93b3: Valentina Vkhodyashchaya: Submit the CB-0 cell diagram officially. The archive loves a map more than a witness.
entries.gt_5bf8c65a6baf09: The CB-0 cell diagram was submitted to the Ministry; the witnesses became an appendix to the case.
entries.gt_38a6417106ea9d: Pavel Kopirochny: Give me the CB testimony correction. I will make a copy where the witness fears by form.
entries.gt_e14a78cf34ed41: The CB testimony correction went into forgery; the witness now fears by form.
entries.gt_0f00f1f4b1b89e: Semyon Makulaturny: Sell the seizure act for the black palm. The paper will go to market, and the addresses after it.
entries.gt_4d1cb29e8fdcef: The seizure act for the black palm was sold; the addresses went through the market without a stamp.
entries.gt_cdabb2fca2c562: Lidia Nesvidetel: Hide the external cell index with me. Let the surnames live without a column for a while.
entries.gt_bc4c2f3d397afd: The external cell index is hidden; some surnames disappeared from accounting danger.
entries.gt_5986c531f88ecf: Rotmistr Chistopis: Show the CB liquidator memo. The addresses must become an order, not a rumor.
entries.gt_881ed1d600c947: The CB memo was shown to liquidators; the external addresses received a cleanup route.
entries.gt_6c04be35d996e0: Tikhon Podstrochny: Show the central note. Not evidence - a direction for the gaze.
entries.gt_fa37ddb2e4afb0: The CB central note was shown to the cult contact; the external ones received a new route.
entries.gt_aae9efd22d2583: Yakov Davidovich: Show the red CB central note. I am interested not in the god, but in why the form repeats fear.
entries.gt_d7aee236cc8839: Yakov received the red CB central note and compared the shape of fear with the instruments.
entries.gt_63e940a31e8cf4: Window N3 accepted the official stub. The door opened without an extra entry.
entries.gt_7c9a66c7d6f6f6: The archive clearance passed as the senior document. The corridor yielded.
entries.gt_7ec38265cb98a4: The forged stub trembled under the stamp, but N3 opened. The log recorded a line too neat.
entries.gt_ed4ea48cdde2f4: The fake pass matched the color of someone else's mistake. The door opened louder than the paper.
entries.gt_41a4a959f46679: The stolen card opened N3 with someone else's file. The fingers entered the log.
entries.gt_47f14113c7fe4b: The District Council pass went through as senior paper. N3 yielded to the archive line.
entries.gt_053432c4079e4e: The fake District Council pass trembled, but the door chose not to argue in front of the queue.
entries.gt_9cc2e1dd35d7ee: The debt paper became grounds for passage: debt is also a document.
entries.gt_ba4758f95c174b: The fake debt paper passed, but the queue heard someone else's surname creak inside it.
entries.gt_92a2e96ef5d6a6: The repayment receipt closed the question faster than a stamp.
entries.gt_d55ee36c46c375: The seizure order forced N3 to open passage for inspection.
entries.gt_8ac7e596229962: The fast-fee receipt lay down instead of a file. N3 opened, and the cash log left a line without a surname.
entries.gt_07d2f2518d255b: The missing-entry act made the post look for the guilty party in the archive. N3 opened so the dispute would go higher.
entries.gt_8ed32a4c705181: The control key bypassed the paper. For the door it is passage, for the queue it is noise.
entries.gt_da0b0b88c06b43: Window N3 accepts the living by document, the dead by act.
entries.gt_ab37f0ecc0f114: Place the official pass stub dry side up.
entries.gt_89cc1f81229875: With a document, passage is quiet. Without a document, passage also happens, but then the log makes noise.
entries.gt_8efbfd82f8e651: If you have a forgery, do not show it to me. I see old sealing wax along the edge.
entries.gt_6329dbf9e1d5c7: Receipts, stolen cards, and missing-file acts also pass. They simply go afterward somewhere other than you do.
entries.gt_833b12f0a16390: The corridor recognized you as temporarily passing.
entries.gt_73ee0b530c7bf7: A key is not a right. A key is a request for the door not to argue.
entries.gt_46c129e6d96867: I do not open the door. I help the door make a mistake.
entries.gt_93c1eb163fb467: A forged stub will do if you hold it confidently and do not let the Stamp-Eater sniff it.
entries.gt_428473b2530ddb: Forged paper is cheaper than the queue, but costlier than the silence after it.
entries.gt_379a88fa638fbe: If they ask who let you through, name the wall.
entries.gt_bf0371a623859d: The paper passed. Now the main thing is for you to pass faster than the paper.
entries.gt_aad4ba72dcd709: No bribes. Only a fast fee without a receipt.
entries.gt_a845261b63182b: One hundred twenty rubles shorten the queue by exactly one receipt.
entries.gt_26d68d547bbc6c: Money does not replace a document. It becomes a document that is embarrassed by the file.
entries.gt_9f532a0c234f9c: Fee accepted. If anyone asks, the receipt stood here yesterday.
entries.gt_7fd1520bd9f88e: The door likes cash less than paper, but reads a receipt faster.
entries.gt_88e5e8603d8860: Galina Okoshechnaya: An official pass stub, and inspection corridor N3 will open without an entry in the log.
entries.gt_f4328af9a7855c: Arkady Podlozhny: A forged pass stub will carry you through N3 if you do not feed it to the Stamp-Eater.
entries.gt_2d66764b50ca34: Boris Bezchekovy: One hundred twenty rubles for the fast fee, and you receive a receipt N3 will be ashamed to read aloud.
entries.gt_447d112fda9738: The N3 cash desk accepted the fast fee; the receipt became passage with an audit tail.
entries.gt_ac69a6e16e2641: ${GATE_ROOM_NAME} rejected ${ctx.def.name}: needs a stub, clearance, forgery, stolen card, receipt, exposure act, or control key.
entries.gt_7d5500b25c29c9: ${GATE_ROOM_NAME} has already let you through. The paper may rest.
entries.gt_75e134b165bd28: An access document vanished in N3. The queue pretends not to know whose fingers those are.
entries.gt_f3297b2ce8a09b: Inspector Sukhar fell. N3 opened without a document and recorded it as forced passage.
entries.gt_d8f87d5d210df5: Inspection Archive. Hands on the table, documents on the edge, fear separate.
entries.gt_b6496b2c8c261b: I am Nina Dosmotrova. I inspect not people, but whether people match their paper.
entries.gt_9ccb4e402330d5: The temporary pass lies behind the card-file grille. Formally it is yours, if you can leave with it.
entries.gt_cfffd74d1c4e9f: The route box by the rear grille leads onward: District Council card, missing act, L-47 file.
entries.gt_c1585384b5f781: Legal route: key, signature, waiting. Fast route: breathing more quietly by the cabinets.
entries.gt_ecc7090649b85a: Blank forms are more dangerous than weapons. Nothing has been forbidden on them yet.
entries.gt_338bb6e2279e0a: If the Stamp-Eater devours a file, the last person who saw the folder whole will be guilty.
entries.gt_9d7886e7c7ab12: Your clearance has not yet been revoked. That is a rare kind of silence.
entries.gt_cbd33a19f04c4d: The archive marked you in pencil. Pencil erases worse than sealing wax.
entries.gt_431bcc50f06e08: The next inspection has already been scheduled, but the date is still afraid to appear.
entries.gt_77da2783a65c15: Do not touch the upper drawer. The dust shows fingers one by one.
entries.gt_0be9522d1abf73: I am Evsey Zasov. I lock everything that can still be called property.
entries.gt_b19ab527e9fca3: A denunciation without a number spoils the shelf. Three denunciations already make statistics.
entries.gt_7ee1feb2d26bad: Complaints are received at the window, and the consequences are stored with me.
entries.gt_3b881bd20d5efd: Those who do not ask about the key have it. The rest receive a receipt.
entries.gt_3a409308b79d86: The denunciations are filed. The surnames went into a folder, not the corridor.
entries.gt_857c8d88d0059d: You may pass, but do not linger between the cabinets.
entries.gt_15c950b764da25: If the drawer opened by itself, consider that a refusal.
entries.gt_131c554921e3a3: The complaints window is closed, but I am still standing. That is already a form of participation.
entries.gt_a855c40744dca9: The neighbor taps the radiator in alphabet. The archive says radiators are illiterate.
entries.gt_7afab31a6d3dcb: Bring two complaints. They do not believe one; two already create a department.
entries.gt_e703a2acdfa9bb: If your complaint was accepted without a stamp, it means it was accepted against you.
entries.gt_3f1c5ae0f3f0cf: The queue moves only when someone disappears from the list.
entries.gt_6a7b1f14136ba8: The complaints are here. Now I have an incoming number, not a conversation by the wall.
entries.gt_57d4807e84b9f0: Take a coupon. It is wet, but the queue likes wet evidence.
entries.gt_c65259635031bd: I will stand a little longer. Perhaps the duty clerk will return and open the log.
entries.gt_7c136bd36ed764: Do not lean on the door. It opens toward the suspect.
entries.gt_49887faf338805: Yury Dvertsov, liquidator attached to the archive. My order is simple: no one carries out passage without a mark.
entries.gt_00a06da3981085: A Stamp-Eater has nested in the rear card file. It devours passes, then looks like an inspector.
entries.gt_4419933beabe7c: The patrol checks route boxes after all-clear. Steal now, and inspection will find the empty place later.
entries.gt_7d1b4c4c7290ed: Kill it before it learns to sign for management.
entries.gt_a662018bedde1a: A fake pass is best handed to me at once. That is cheaper than explaining yourself to a wall.
entries.gt_fc611ddd93deba: The Stamp-Eater has been written off. The archive lies again in a human voice.
entries.gt_a804a311749d94: The door is calm today. Do not provoke it with paper.
entries.gt_8634c7937fc4e1: I did not write down your number. Consider that gratitude.
entries.gt_fe51fafafb11e5: Nina Dosmotrova: Bring the temporary pass from the rear card file. A key is desirable; silence is mandatory.
entries.gt_f37b876201a85e: Nina Dosmotrova: Four blank forms. Before samosbor, they must acquire meaning.
entries.gt_feeda788a6a1f5: Evsey Zasov: Three denunciations for the index. Without an index, a denunciation becomes a conversation.
entries.gt_25561cbb5f7b6c: Marfa Zhalobnaya: Two neighbor complaints. The archive considers one of them a mood.
entries.gt_9cbe4d790e8e3a: Yury Dvertsov: Kill the Stamp-Eater in the rear card file before it eats the passes.
entries.gt_a91e594e6ff5cd: Inspection route box: search, District Council, L-47
entries.gt_f795c71c928c1d: Looking for an NII audit? Follow the smell of wet stamp and expensive empty containers.
entries.gt_228663f4f48b75: My waybill is zero: the cargo exists, but by documents it has already disappeared.
entries.gt_f36ddcec0d5d38: Reach the audit room, and you will understand who profits from an empty test tube.
entries.gt_cdbfa0143d4004: You found the room. Now the main thing is not to become an appendix to the register.
entries.gt_50a58ca196e800: Zero waybills love those who do not ask for the second copy.
entries.gt_b673c462fcade0: NII Audit. Do not touch the test tubes with bare formulations.
entries.gt_2ae206dc6b903c: By act, the silver sample is empty. If the act is correct, the sample stops existing for everyone except the market.
entries.gt_73760dcb0165e4: A planted act is better than a scandal: NII keeps face, and you get access to clean quarantine paper.
entries.gt_5009f506ddb8e7: Liquidators love the word contraband. They pronounce it like a shot.
entries.gt_ab8e065ed13289: The audit is closed in an acceptable direction.
entries.gt_b2e66004d1520c: The test tubes are silent. That is a rare laboratory result.
entries.gt_c173c96c42acd1: Maksim Opechatkin. If NII sells samples out the left door, there is already a corpse lying on the right.
entries.gt_0207c696b7aad0: I need a leak register. Not a rumor, not a test tube, but paper with a chain of cabinets.
entries.gt_cc7dedeae47a40: Bring the register, and I will raise the inventory. The scientists will be angry, but the market will lose an address.
entries.gt_29cc452a81c7fd: The chain is filed. Now every cabinet shows where NII is and where the market is.
entries.gt_254448b6f34eea: Good evidence smells not of truth, but of the fear of those who signed.
entries.gt_2bb6e7ab13f319: I am not the market. I am the person the market brings leftovers to when it does not want to show itself.
entries.gt_c873b1dcb7740b: A silver sample is worth more than truth, because truth cannot be smoked, smeared, and resold.
entries.gt_0f31db36058046: Bring the sample, and you get money and a sheet with a stamp. The paper will later say you were not here.
entries.gt_2298e6937a4ffa: The sample left quietly. Quietly means everyone knows and no one names it.
entries.gt_f266966a623258: If a liquidator asks, I sold only empty containers.
entries.gt_91a0b4be88c1e4: Courier with a Zero Waybill: Find the NII audit room {dir}. There, test tubes disappear only on paper.
entries.gt_4aeebbe86bf445: Irina Nulevaya: Bring the planted NII act. The leak will become an accounting error, not a crime.
entries.gt_37ea1df60d28a7: Maksim Opechatkin: The NII leak register. With it I will close the sample chain from cabinet to market.
entries.gt_430d6952eb1513: Senya Beznakladnoy: The silver NII sample goes to me. Let the rest argue in protocols.
entries.gt_5788899ea62a49: The NII register went to liquidators: the market loses an address, the scientists lose face.
entries.gt_7e84985dd41907: The silver sample went to a middleman: the market pays now, audit comes later.
entries.gt_e8820f9aa8564b: The planted act entered the file: NII gives thanks, and the liquidator inventory loses a tooth.
entries.gt_453c6a67377580: Issue the cage key only to someone who does not know the word market.
entries.gt_1054094fdbf8b8: The silver sample is written off as empty containers. The courier signed with someone else's cabinet number.
entries.gt_2dbc5475f3f696: The passport desk accepts the living who are listed as living.
entries.gt_db814b4b916c68: Two blank forms, and I will issue clearance to the cards without the night queue.
entries.gt_197046cd678509: Do not sign a blank form. The signature is faster than the applicant here.
entries.gt_580305cce448ac: The archive hears a fake stamp by its creak. Sometimes it pretends not to hear.
entries.gt_cd58cc19611833: A stolen card opens a drawer faster than it closes a file.
entries.gt_c60a350a6dfc83: Clearance issued. Do not bend it by the doors.
entries.gt_ce042d89addd39: If the card smells of wet concrete, do not call it yours.
entries.gt_658072fba142c2: I do not forge. I clarify the stamp toward the required truth.
entries.gt_5932543e781028: Bring ink, and there will be a stamped sheet. The risk is yours, the handwriting is mine.
entries.gt_b02b034ced095c: Security looks at the color. The archive looks at fear.
entries.gt_971ddd9981b054: A fake stub is good until the first Stamp-Eater. It scents not legality, but glue.
entries.gt_1f825a7aff3adb: The stamp is similar. Too similar, so do not smile.
entries.gt_dd4f7b19a6434d: If they ask where you got the sheet, say it laid itself in the folder.
entries.gt_7c4547b1b07baf: I need a card from the service drawer. Do not ask whose.
entries.gt_293615b18e0654: If you take it from the card file without clearance, the log will call it theft. The log loves precision.
entries.gt_12dcd7f9ab4177: Return the card, and you receive a copy of the personal file. Sometimes it matters more than a key.
entries.gt_8f887eca698494: Do not read the stolen card by the shelf. The shelf may decide you are the appendix.
entries.gt_2361ee746f595b: I have the card. Now the archive does not know whom it lost.
entries.gt_1eda943afe9b4f: The file copy is yours. The original is already arguing with the cabinet.
entries.gt_9187afa3be5f13: I inspect files that officially went missing.
entries.gt_322fbd3c709f5f: Find the missing file, and you return it. Find the missing act, and you show everyone.
entries.gt_3e014bf6d72a0b: Forgery speeds up access. Then it speeds up the search.
entries.gt_d18c90796740c9: The file is alive, but it is not accepted without a cover. Hold it cover outward.
entries.gt_e390afdc975c7c: The shortage is documented. Now the corridor is not guilty; a specific cabinet is.
entries.gt_972e870c4bce99: Documents are useful until they start being read aloud.
entries.gt_c81b9a3170a754: Marfa Pasportnaya: Two blank forms. I will issue clearance to the archive card without the night queue. Do not sign the blank.
entries.gt_8c963d848ebd13: Ippolit Podshtampov: Two inkwells. I will make a stamped sheet that almost does not tremble.
entries.gt_b50c4010ce57bc: Kira Kartotechnaya: Bring a stolen archive card from the service card file. The log will notice, but the shelf will stop choosing an owner by itself.
entries.gt_befca07c55aa51: Timur Nedostacha: Return the missing personal file. While it is missing, I am guilty, and the cabinet looks for the next one.
entries.gt_57ac0a014dc55e: Timur Nedostacha: Find the missing-entry act. Let the cabinet answer publicly.
entries.gt_a5356a45c51fe7: Weapons Permit Bureau. The barrel must become paper first.
entries.gt_921ad4835b139c: A Makarov without a stub counts as iron with intent.
entries.gt_99498113de76f2: Two blank forms, and I will issue a permit only for a short pistol incident.
entries.gt_b27ab640656213: A permit is not a pistol. The barrel itself is paid for separately through Stepan, by the log.
entries.gt_bbd47a914dfc7e: An automatic weapon does not go through this window. The window fears queues, but not that much.
entries.gt_87632ae88ebfd1: An ammo order lives once. Then the cabinet demands a new pretext.
entries.gt_a2a45fe35405e5: If you take from the cabinet without a signature, the log will call it not bravery, but shortage.
entries.gt_5415585505ed7e: Permit issued. It does not make a shot legal, only inspectable.
entries.gt_52b03bd19a16ed: Do not wet the cartridge order, and do not show it to someone who smiles without a face.
entries.gt_a42743d5679f72: I do not forge weapon papers. I put the signature where they will not look for it long.
entries.gt_b0c1c40034ce42: Bring the sheet with the fake stamp here, and there will be a permit best not read aloud.
entries.gt_d0d66cbe0182af: Security sees the stamp color. Audit sees the time, place, and your back.
entries.gt_322ebbfd1e8b29: Fake paper opens not a cabinet, but a conversation with whoever later asks where it came from.
entries.gt_dda8b065077cf4: The permit is almost real. Do not hold it near a real person.
entries.gt_e4de6fd0ae3dae: If the cabinet clicks after you, it means the paper passed before you.
entries.gt_3ce4be9a31ef2f: Show the paper, not the pistol.
entries.gt_cd590e4e0ca947: I issue only a small supply. Whoever asks for a crate of cartridges is already in the report.
entries.gt_7cc284850c6022: Legal route: a processed log, seventy rubles for a homemade short-barrel, or a one-use cartridge order.
entries.gt_d2d0605de61498: The illegal route stands closer to the cabinet. Then closer to the protocol.
entries.gt_f65746b3e8a460: Turn the fake weapon permit in here. Not for cartridges, but so the surname lands in the correct folder.
entries.gt_a06dcc20272d75: Issued at minimum. It will be enough to leave, if you do not start a war.
entries.gt_9929681c64689d: The bureau will count the next cartridge with your name already attached.
entries.gt_d882920ffd690c: Galina Korotkostvolnaya: Two blank forms, and we will process a short-barrel permit without the night cabinet.
entries.gt_1be595475bc63a: The Weapons Permit Bureau processed a legal short-barrel packet.
entries.gt_d74a7d7842f7a1: Boris Podchistkin: Bring the sheet with a fake stamp. I will make a permit best not warmed in the palm.
entries.gt_2fa828b5c2b07b: A fake weapon paper appeared in the bureau; audit remembered the even stamp.
entries.gt_d43c4099c68f80: Stepan Patronov: The permit is already in the log. Seventy rubles for a homemade short-barrel; cartridges only by separate order.
entries.gt_1dae66f95942c8: The short-barrel was bought through the bureau log; cartridges remained a separate deficit.
entries.gt_7f894fe77e4667: Stepan Patronov: I accept the cartridge order once. I will give a dozen nines; find the rest alive.
entries.gt_508084140dc1d3: The one-use cartridge order was redeemed for ten nines.
entries.gt_8c396e3cfb8f78: Stepan Patronov: Bring the fake weapon permit here. I will confiscate it without cartridges, but with a note that you came on your own.
entries.gt_48730f3f6c1661: The fake weapon permit was handed to liquidators as confiscated property.
entries.gt_52e703fe975b08: Card File of the Impossible Alphabet
entries.gt_282811f8dac608: The Kartotechnik does not eat a file immediately. First he convinces the cabinet the file is in the wrong place.
entries.gt_46987b3d9337e3: A blank form can be slipped into the sacrificial drawer. Then the shelf believes for a minute that it has already won.
entries.gt_8cab9c013c9b0a: Do not stand in a straight line: the Paragraph shoots better than any inspector.
entries.gt_6778f8da512d07: If the drawers click through an alphabet that does not exist, run to the far cabinet or open the middle passage with the key.
entries.gt_60fae246b58aa8: The emptiness in the form distracted the shelf. Now it is angry by instruction.
entries.gt_0617378abbc83a: The key to the middle passage is yours. Do not argue with it by a living cabinet.
entries.gt_84c5a18244aaff: My personal file went into the far drawer without legs. That is worse than theft: at least theft can be seen.
entries.gt_17fcf8b2a36653: Find the missing folder. It should be in the cabinet of the impossible letter, if the Kartotechnik has not changed his mind.
entries.gt_1f1a0e8bdb19fb: Take forms along the way, but remember: the Stamp-Eater counts a person as a folder if there is too much paper.
entries.gt_1bcd1403433594: The file returned. Now I am again listed as an error, not an empty place.
entries.gt_039acbf7713886: The archive lost confidence. That is almost victory.
entries.gt_20aabc4da25fea: A wrong index can be burned before it becomes right. Paper hates that kind of freedom.
entries.gt_0c3014873da5ee: I need the missing-entry act intact. The pointer should burn, not the evidence.
entries.gt_e6ed7f4b9de606: The ink smells of smoke after that, but Paragraphs read it more slowly.
entries.gt_0299f513c3af7d: The index is burned. A hole remains in the cabinet, but it can no longer find the right shelf.
entries.gt_2515bee4b4ead4: If you hear rustling, that is no longer my copy.
entries.gt_6bfe6140a6db2d: Lidia Alfavitnaya: Slip a blank form in place of a living file. I will give you the key to the middle bank of drawers while the Kartotechnik is busy with the dummy.
entries.gt_6c949408340a1e: ${ROOM_NAME}: a blank form lies by the front desk or in the sacrificial drawer.
entries.gt_0c558861478fc4: Pavel Nedoopisanny: Return the missing personal file from the far cabinet of the impossible letter. If you delay, the route will grow one drawer longer.
entries.gt_f9536bf328928d: ${ROOM_NAME}: the file has been moved to the far card file beside the Paragraph.
entries.gt_37a082336e6d9a: Semyon Pepelny: Bring the missing-entry act from the ashtray. The wrong index is already burned; now we need a trace, not a fire.
entries.gt_a90d5ae8f99310: ${ROOM_NAME}: the act lies in the ashtray of the wrong index.
entries.gt_6be28c846b1a36: The Kartotechnik moved the file to the far cabinet. The route became one drawer longer.
entries.gt_333ba312a1a136: The missing file returned from the impossible letter. The archive lost its prey, but remembered the hands.
entries.gt_7120b130b0e268: The blank form took the hit. The key to the middle bank of drawers was issued.
entries.gt_ce13fe92d64de0: The wrong index was burned before the route. Only a missing act remains in the archive.
entries.gt_a663f2e91e8c7f: The file's term expired. The folder did not disappear, but the Kartotechnik had time to rewrite the path to it.
entries.gt_0fa43b6ff89a32: Drawers open by an impossible alphabet. A blank form distracts the shelf; the far cabinet holds the moved file.
entries.gt_add7c3888bd50b: The card file accepts only quiet surnames. Loud surnames wake the cabinets.
entries.gt_bc121c69ca9243: I am Osip Kartochny. I keep records of those who stood in the queue, stand in it, and will stand retroactively.
entries.gt_98967e3f87304b: Every card has a face. Some faces have too many cards.
entries.gt_ef2cdd27745b86: If you need a pass, bring books. A thick cover holds the archive bite.
entries.gt_377f203f6dca26: Do not open the green drawer. It counts fingers before issue and after.
entries.gt_9e4ea28818e323: Zoya's stamp? Then one of the drawers has been recognized as real today. A rare case.
entries.gt_57ddd4249a8460: The card file does not store the past. It stores variants that have not yet been forbidden.
entries.gt_5c326405a524a6: A certificate without a card is a rumor. Rumors stand in a separate queue here.
entries.gt_0ea673eb40c645: The cards are filed. The queue shortened by one person and lengthened by two cases.
entries.gt_6fc05a0379f7c0: Your number lies between an empty place and a complaint.
entries.gt_d93aef310d40e5: When the cabinets whisper the alphabet, leave at the letter Zh.
entries.gt_bd5fc2dd196bbd: The stamp arrived. Tell Zoya the drawer accepted it and did not creak.
entries.gt_8b39f67236e967: I have been standing here since morning. Not this morning. Just morning.
entries.gt_5d77f788142564: My number was called three times, each time by a different voice from a different wall.
entries.gt_d965e0cc7bb832: If you reach the window, do not trust the sign. Signs trade places when you blink.
entries.gt_b38a303aedd0c6: They stole my water and said it was service acceleration.
entries.gt_6b666ff40b92e2: Bring water. I will give you a place that has not been born yet.
entries.gt_20c3167dbfd04f: The man ahead of me went home, but his coat continues to occupy the number.
entries.gt_a70f0a2674a1cf: The girl by the window grew two heads while waiting for a signature.
entries.gt_63ebbc9f9c9f60: When the siren sounds, the queue does not scatter. It simply becomes denser.
entries.gt_c835c2622570da: There is water. Now one can wait more slowly.
entries.gt_3472949a516274: Take my place. It is third after the one without a face.
entries.gt_1d1bb8ddb50acf: The queue remembered you. That is bad, but useful.
entries.gt_bb0a04e6880c7c: Osip Kartochny: Four books for the card file. Covers hold the archive bite.
entries.gt_02ee794eecfe84: Osip Kartochny: Bring a fake ration coupon. Do not sell it: someone else's supper later looks for a witness.
entries.gt_904c8cc10730e7: Klavdia Ocherednaya: Two bottles of water. I will give up a place by the pass window before the queue notices mercy.
entries.gt_b3cb0332c55135: A place by the pass window was obtained by helping a person in the queue.
entries.gt_33dff89a0bc2e7: The Matka of Documents does not birth paper. It births grounds.
entries.gt_34081ff65886f0: If the table starts breathing, do not argue with it using bullets. Close the cabinets or find the cancellation form.
entries.gt_b180f188d33ed9: A blank form distracts her better than screaming. Emptiness has high priority in the Ministry.
entries.gt_c36723f6946979: The wrong stack is better burned than read. Reading counts as consent.
entries.gt_9c58bbcee0b3a5: The table fell silent. Now the documents at least pretend to lie still.
entries.gt_17ea0c285a87b4: The stamp of order does not cure order. It makes it louder.
entries.gt_e5a79c935d09e8: Nina Otmennaya: Find the Matka of Documents table {dir}. Paper there must be extinguished by a form, not by a queue.
entries.gt_f456aa1e4e60bd: Ministry: archive office with cabinets, forms, and a central table.
entries.gt_9fc833457ab372: Nina Otmennaya: Bring an unsigned order from the brood table. If you can, cancel the cancellation form first.
entries.gt_4a45562e8b7a4a: The Matka of Documents entered a delay: the corridor sends you through someone else's window.
entries.gt_f10ef4a630e9b1: The cabinets breathed in paper. On the table, the stamp struck by itself.
entries.gt_2a95b44588ae12: A paper threat rose from the cabinet: ${spawned}.
entries.gt_d820125c716e80: Active papers received a new stamp.
entries.gt_5f0c9de43abd8c: The Matka rustles, but the living-paper limit is already spent.
entries.gt_1c00ca1e3b467f: The cancellation form lay on the table. The papers stopped reproducing.
entries.gt_a9f90866536149: The order was torn from the brood table. Papers have already risen, but no more will come.
entries.gt_9f98b466e7158e: Blank forms went as bait: the table counts them as applicants.
entries.gt_3dec17249d17f4: The wrong stack flared up: one paper executor crumbled.
entries.gt_cf04d9d0b6699f: The wrong stack charred. It became harder for the Matka to reproduce grounds.
entries.gt_87fff59c020c23: The cabinet slammed shut. One sheet did not have time to become a monster.
entries.gt_7e3bf898d09161: The cabinet is closed. The paper breathing grew shorter.
entries.gt_d7fb5c41eac8a0: The cancellation form passed without a queue.
entries.gt_de73e3ffb3900a: The paper threat is torn. Active ones left at the table: ${remaining}.
entries.gt_74febdb6c232d8: The last raised paper crumbled after cancellation.
entries.gt_922fb7b064c780: The last paper is torn, but the table still demands a form.
entries.gt_9a06d8bac9308e: If you read to the end, the document counts you as executor.
